overall.description: First-person exploration of a geothermal riverbank in a high-fidelity game engine, featuring mineral deposits, hot springs, and pine forests under a bright summer sky. The camera moves at walking pace along the rocky shoreline, gradually turning inland toward scattered pine trees.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky shoreline beside a flowing river

entered.detail: wide river with flowing water along the left side of the path
white mineral-crusted ground with scattered gray rocks
dense cluster of tall evergreen trees on the right horizon
forest-covered mountain range under blue sky
large gray rocks strewn across the mineral ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright, sunny day along a geothermal riverbank. The camera walks forward on white, mineral-crusted terrain with the river flowing on the left and a pine forest visible in the distance on the right. Large boulders are scattered across the rocky ground.

events.description: camera turns right toward the tree line, revealing turquoise geothermal pools

agents.ego_description: gradually turning right while walking, shifting focus from the river to the inland geothermal features

entered.detail: small turquoise-blue hot spring pools with mineral deposits around edges

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right away from the river, revealing vibrant turquoise geothermal pools scattered across the white mineral terrain. The pine forest on the right grows closer and more detailed as the camera approaches, while the river recedes from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky geothermal terrain with scattered pines

events.description: passing close by a tall pine tree on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking past a large pine tree while navigating the rocky geothermal terrain

entered.detail: tall single pine tree with thick trunk that the camera approaches closely

segments.scene_description: The camera continues forward through the rocky terrain, approaching and passing very close to a prominent pine tree on the right. The geothermal pools fall behind as the camera moves deeper among the scattered trees, with the white mineral ground continuing underfoot.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a bright geothermal riverbank that gradually shifts inland toward a dense pine forest. It begins by walking forward across white, mineral-crusted terrain with a flowing river to the left and scattered boulders under a sunny sky. As the camera turns right, the river recedes from view to reveal vibrant turquoise geothermal pools dotting the rocky ground. The scene then shifts deeper into the landscape, passing closely by a prominent pine tree as the pools fall behind. Finally, the camera moves further among the scattered trees while the white mineral terrain continues underfoot.
